name: Shizuki Electric Company Inc.
summary: Shizuki Electric Company Inc. provides capacitors, and related equipment and facilities; and electrical machinery and equipment in Japan and internationally. It offers power factor correction products, harmonic filters, and voltage sag compensators; and AC and DC filter capacitors, and snubber capacitors for automotive inverters, power electronics circuits, and home appliances. The company was founded in 1939 and is based in Nishinomiya, Japan.
